reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) Terrible service! They only fill up with the most expensive fuel for Brazilians, they didn't accept our credit card, and in reais they paid 25% less than the exchange rate of other places. If you're a foreigner, stay away!

(Original)
Péssimo atendimento! Abastecem somente o combustível mais caro para brasileiros, não aceitaram nosso cartão de crédito, e em reais pagaram 25% abaixo da cotação dos demais locais. Se for estrangeiro fique longe!

reviews.comment:
Haces la fila por una hora y cuando estás por cargar te avisan que aceptan solo efectivo...o casualidad unas horas antes del aumento.Argentina el país de los que se creen vivos. Después saldrán a llorar cuando les saquen la representación de la marca

(Translated by Google)
You wait in line for an hour, and just as you're about to top up, they tell you they only accept cash... what a coincidence, just a few hours before the price increase. Argentina, the land of those who think they're so clever. Then they'll come crying when they lose the brand's distributorship.

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) They don't bother serving tourists; the price for tourists almost doubles. It goes from 628 pesos to 1,100. I suggest looking for an Axion gas station. Don't even bother stopping. And that's what tourists from other countries are spending, boosting the city's economy.

(Original)
Não fazem questão de atender turistas, o preço para turistas quase dobra. De 628 pesos vai para 1.100, indico a procurar um posto Axion. Nem parem. Isso que o turista de outro país está gastando e girando a economia da cidade.

reviewReply.comment:
Buenas noches Sr. Turista disculpe el inconveniencia pero es el precio establecido para extranjeros. 
Lo esperamos nuevamente.

reviews.comment:
En nuestro caso la atención fue amable, nos corrieron la valla para poder estacionar y organizar mejor el equipaje.
Había una larga cola por la falta de combustible, pero estaba muy bien organizado y fluía rápidamente.

(Translated by Google)
In our case, the service was friendly; they moved the barrier so we could park and organize our luggage more easily. There was a long line due to a fuel shortage, but it was very well organized and moved quickly.
